amenities.description: Users may park their own vehicles at this facility.
The surface of the facility is solid, such as asphalt or concrete.
Entering/exiting the facility does not require touching shared surfaces.
The facility has staff on-site for assistance and questions.
The facility has a shuttle available to nearby destinations, like an airport.

arrival.text: When you arrive at the location, please pull up to the kiosk under the blue awning. If your reservation has a barcode, please scan it for entry.
If your reservation does not have a barcode, then press the online parking prop and take a ticket. You will need this ticket when you return.
Proceed and park in any available spot in PARKING AREA C.
Once you've parked, you may board the complimentary shuttle to Miami International Airport.

departure.text: When you return to MIA, please proceed to the second level (departures), to catch the shuttle back to the hotel.
When you arrive back to the hotel, if you used your barcode to enter, you may exit the premises by scanning that barcode at the exit gate.

If you have a ticket, before going to your car you must provide the hotel front desk with your online parking paid receipt pulled at entry. You will be provided a validation ticket; you will need both the parking ticket and the validation ticket to exit the premises.

common.title: Hilton Miami Airport Blue Lagoon - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: This parking lot is located at the end of Blue Lagoon Dr. From the intersection of Blue Lagoon Dr. and NW 57th Ct., head east on Blue Lagoon Dr. until you reach the end. This is the Hilton Miami Airport Blue Lagoon lot.
restrictions: All infractions will be subject to either tow and/or penalty.
Due to construction currently taking place at MIA, the shuttle pick-up area will be on the airport’s upper level.
Height restriction: 6' 4"
No RV's, trucks of any kind, SUV or cars with a trailer are permitted.
The shuttle departs every 30 minutes on the hour, it's approximately 15 minutes to the airport.
The shuttle to Miami International Airport runs at the top of every hour between the hours of 6am and 12am, 7 days a week. You will need to arrange your own transportation outside of these hours.
This listing/facility has a 2 luggage per person limit. Additional pieces would be an additional cost of $5.00 each way to be paid on site.
WHEN MAKING YOUR RESERVATION, PLEASE PROVIDE ALL OF YOUR CONTACT INFORMATION & VEHICLE INFORMATION. THIS IS IMPORTANT SO WE CAN IDENTIFY YOUR VEHICLE & CONFIRM IT IS LEGALLY PARKED.
You must park in the designated online parking area, please make sure you only take up 1 spot.

arrival.text: Upon arrival, proceed to the front desk to register your vehicle. The front desk agent will provide you with a parking tag to hang inside your car on the front windshield.

Check with attendant the information of how to catch the shuttle to and from the airport. The first shuttle starts at 6:00 AM daily, from the hotel, and runs every 45 mins. Last shuttle will depart the hotel, daily at 9:30 PM.

departure.text: The first shuttle starts at 6:00 AM daily, from the hotel, and runs every 45 mins. Last shuttle will depart the hotel, daily at 9:30 PM. Guests with reservations must wait for the shuttle on the Arrival/Baggage claim Level 1 (arrivals) and follow signs to 2nd FLOOR DEPARTURE. DOORS 8, 15, 22, & 26. You will be looking out for a white Ford van with the Sleep Inn name and logo on it. Please waive to the shuttle driver so that he can acknowledge you by stopping.
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: Sleep Inn Miami Airport - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 105 Fairway Dr. This is the Sleep Inn Miami Airport  lot, operated by Sleep Inn Miami Airport. It is located on the North side of Fairway Dr. between Garden Dr. and Hugh Frank Dr.

amenities.description: A valet will park the users vehicle at this facility.
The facility has a roof over the vehicles.
The facility has staff on-site for assistance and questions.

arrival.text: No need to pull a ticket! Pull up to our facility entrance and scan your Spot Hero QR code to open the gate.
After proceeding through the gate, there will be a valet who will park your car.
The Park N Fly shuttle will pick you up directly at your vehicle to take you to the airport.

departure.text: Upon return, please claim your luggage and follow the pick up instructions on the Locator Slip provided by your shuttle driver.
From there, follow the signs to the exit.

common.title: Park N Fly Miami Airport - Covered Valet
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location on 3901 NW 28th St. This is the Park N Fly garage, operated by The Parking Spot. It is located on the North side of NW 28th St. between NW 40th Ave. and NW 37th Ave.
restrictions: Please have your QR code ready to scan when you arrive. This helps us get you parked and on your way in no time. Thank you!

arrival.text: When entering the lot, push button to retrieve a ticket (bring ticket to the front desk, with License Plate#), proceed to the right towards the restaurant (do not park in front of the hotel).
Visit the front desk and display your SpotHero reservation, either printed or on a mobile device. You will also provide the hotel staff with your vehicle information and sign a waiver.

Shuttle service to MIA is available from this location at no additional cost between the hours of 4:30 am - 11:30 pm on the hour and the half hour (:00 and :30). Outside of these hours, transportation is not provided or arranged by the hotel.

departure.text: When you return to MIA, please contact the hotel directly at 305-264-4888 upon arriving at the hotel transportation pick up zones. Hotel Transportation pick-up is located on the 1st Floor, Arrivals Level- Hotel Transporation Zone. Look for a white shuttle with 'Pullman Hotel' lettering on the side.
Please stop by the front desk to have your vehicle ticket validated to exit.

common.title: Pullman Hotel - Uncovered Self Park
common.operator_display_name: Pullman Hotel - Miami International Airport MIA Parking
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 5800 Blue Lagoon Dr. This is the Pullman Hotel MIA uncovered self-park lot. It is located on the south side of Blue Lagoon Dr. between NW 57th Ave. and NW 62nd Ave. When entering the lot, proceed towards the restaurant (do not park in front of the hotel) and visit the hotel front desk.
restrictions: Height restriction: 6' 3"
Please be advised: This location cannot accommodate RV’s, moving trucks, cargo trailers, buses, and oversized trucks. Parking any of the above may result in a ticket and/or tow.

Shuttle service to MIA is available from this location at no additional cost between the hours of 4:30 am - 11:30 pm. The shuttle departs from the hotel on the hour and on the half hour (:00 and :30). Outside of these hours, transportation is not provided or arranged by the hotel. When you return to MIA, board the return shuttle on the 2nd floor near departures. Look for a white shuttle with 'Pullman Hotel' lettering on the side.
Standard sized vehicles only. Due to size constraints, this location is unable to accommodate minivans, midsize and large SUVs, pickup trucks, and passenger vans.

arrival.text: Upon arrival, press the ticket button on the entry screen and take the ticket dispensed by the machine to enter the hotel.

Present your reservation confirmation (paper or phone) to the Marriott valet attendant. (Main Entrance)

The valet attendant will issue you a white Park & Fly ticket. Be sure to place it on your Dashboard.
After checking in with the valet, proceed to park in the designated area near the Courtyard Marriott.
After parking, head to the shuttle pick up area and board the shuttle to the airport.

departure.text: When you return to MIA, proceed to the Hotel Shuttle pickup area, located on the airport's first floor, Arrivals level.
After retrieving your vehicle, show the gate attendant the parking fly pass displayed on your dashboard. the gate attendant will lift the gate and you will be free to go.

common.title: Marriot Connection Miami Airport - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 1201 NW LeJuene Rd. This is the Mariott uncovered self-park lot, operated by Parking Management Services Inc. It is located on the east side of NW LeJeune Rd. between NW 11th St. and NW 37th Ave. The entrance is marked by a white 'Marriott' sign. Pull up to the gate when you enter.
restrictions: Do not park in front of the main Marriott. This parking area is exclusive for hotel guests.
Do not park in handicap spaces or cab stand spots.
Height restriction: 8' 0"
If you require transportation to MIA when the shuttle is not operating between 1am-5am, use the following Uber promo code: bjyeh
See the valet attendant at the Miami airport Marriott for a parking fly pass.

Shuttle service to MIA is available at no additional cost from this location from 5am–1am Monday–Sunday. The shuttle departs every 15 minutes. When you return to MIA, proceed to the Hotel Shuttle pickup area, located on the first floor, Arrivals level.
The courtyard parking lot is the designated area to park.

arrival.text: When you arrive, you may park in any open space not marked as "Reserved." After you park, proceed to the hotel front desk and show the receptionist your SpotHero parking pass and you will be given a parking validation.
Collect your belongings and call your taxi/rideshare to the airport.

departure.text: Upon your return, take a taxi/rideshare back to the hotel.
You will use your validation to exit. Simply leave when you are ready to go!

common.title: Hyatt Place Miami Airport East - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location on 3549 NW Le Jeune Road. This is the Hyatt Place Airport East lot, operated by MCR Investors. It is located on the East/Right-hand side of NW Le Jeune Rd. (a one-way street) between NW 31st St. and S River Dr. Follow the exit for S River Dr. The entrance will be before the street turns into S River Dr.
restrictions: Height restriction: 6' 4"
Standard sized vehicles only. Due to size constraints, this location is unable to accommodate minivans, midsize and large SUVs, pickup trucks, and passenger vans.

arrival.text: As you pull up to the hotel entrance, please pull a ticket from our machine and park your vehicle after the stop sign. You will need to show your reservation, either printed or on your mobile device, at the front desk. You will be issued a parking pass to place in your vehicle facing outward.

You will be directed where to park. Shuttle service to MIA is available at no additional cost from this location 24/7. The shuttle runs every 30 minutes on the hour and on the half hour and leaves from the front entrance of the hotel.

departure.text: When you return to MIA, please head to the Departure Level (Floor 2) and wait curbside for return shuttle pickup.
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: Embassy Suites Miami Airport - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 3974 NW S River Dr. This is the Embassy Suites Miami Airport uncovered self-park. It is located on the southwest side of NW S River Dr. between S River Dr. and NW 31st St. The entrance is marked by a brown 'Entrance' sign with white lettering.
restrictions: Shuttle service to MIA is available at no additional cost from this location 24/7. The shuttle runs every 30 minutes, departs from the hotel on the hour and on the half hour from the front entrance of the hotel. When you return to MIA, please head to the Departure Level (Floor 2) and wait curbside for return shuttle pickup.

arrival.text: Upon arrival, proceed into the lobby and show your prepaid parking pass to the front desk staff. After receiving validation instructions from them you may park in any non-reserved space.
Make sure your license plate matches the plate on your Parking Pass. Failure to do so will result in a ticket or tow.
Secure your vehicle, and board the shuttle to MIA. https://trackmyshuttle.com/a/3525

departure.text: After retrieving your luggage follow signs for “Ground Transportation - Hotel Shuttle Area”.
Look for our shuttle van with the Element logo, which runs on a constant loop approx. every 30 mins between 7a-11p. https://trackmyshuttle.com/a/3525
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 3525 NW 25th St. This is the Element Miami International Airport lot. It is located on the North side of NW 25th St between NW 35th Ave and NW 36th Ave.
restrictions: Look for our shuttle van with the Element logo, which runs on a constant loop approx. every 30 mins between 7a-11p. https://trackmyshuttle.com/a/3525

arrival.text: Scan your QR Code at the box with the red flashing lights. Hold the QR code about 2 inches away from the reader and the gate will open.
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".
Please gather your belongings and proceed to the designated shuttle pick-up area. Shuttle service is available 24/7 and runs every 30 minutes.

departure.text: Upon your return, please gather your belongings and proceed to the designated shuttle pick-up area on the 2nd floor departure level and call 305-636-7000 for transportation back to the facility. All pickups start from Door 5 and up.
When exiting, scan your QR Code again at the box with the red flashing lights. The gate will open and you're free to go!

common.title: EVEN Hotel Miami - Covered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location on Northwest 25th Street. Enter this location at 3499 NW 25th St. This is the EVEN Hotel Miami garage, operated by Purchase Park 2 Fly. It is located on the North side of NW 25th St. between NW 35th Ave. and NW S River Dr.
restrictions: Height restriction: 7' 0"

arrival.text: Upon arrival please check in with valet attendant right at the ramp to show your SpotHero parking pass and to register your vehicle. After following instructions provided by staff, secure your vehicle.Valet is open Sunday - Thursday 6 am - 11 pm, and Friday- Saturday 6 am - 1 am.
Outside of valet hours the lot becomes Self Park. You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".

Board the shuttle when ready. The shuttle operates daily from 6 a.m. to 11 p.m. Shuttle leaves every 30 mins. Last Shuttle leaves at 10:30 p.m. Shuttle service works only for Miami International Airport.

departure.text: Upon your return, retrieve your luggage, Shuttle leaves every 30 mins. proceed to the lower (arrivals) level. The shuttle operates daily from 6 a.m. to 11 p.m. Last shuttle leaves at 10:30p.m.
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel Miami Airport & Convention Center - Uncovered Valet
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 7231 NW 7th St. This is the entrance address for the DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel Miami Airport & Convention Center - Uncovered Valet, operated by Bramel Group Corp. It is located on the Northwest side of NW 7th St. between NW 71st Ave. and NW 67th Ave.
restrictions: 2 day minimum parking is required.
This location operates as Valet during the following times, Sunday - Thursday 6am - 11pm, Friday- Saturday 6am - 1am. Outside of these hours the lot becomes Self Park.

You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".
There is no shuttle service to the airport. You may book a ride to the airport using Rideshare or Taxi.

departure.text: When you return to the airport you will need to arrange transportation back to the facility using Rideshare or a Taxi. There is no shuttle service from the airport.
When exiting, scan your QR Code again at the box with the red flashing lights. The gate will open and you're free to go!

common.title: CityPlace Doral - Covered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 3450 NW 83rd Ave. #140. This is the entrance address for the CityPlace Doral garage, operated by Icon Parking. It is located on the West/Right-hand side of NW 83rd Ave. (a one-way street) between NW 36th St. and NW 35th St.
restrictions: No Exotic or Luxury Vehicles.
